criteria.criterion: `resolve_symbol` classifies a dependency installed in a repo-nested `.venv` (origin under `<repo>/.venv/.../site-packages/…`) as `third-party/stdlib`, not `repo-local`.
Genuine first-party source under the root (e.g. `src/rebar/…`, not in a dependency root) still classifies as `repo-local` (no over-exclusion).
Regression tests cover the in-tree-`.venv` case and the first-party `src/` case.

citation.description: Test pass/fail and lint/typecheck are explicitly out of scope for completion verification per agent rules. The implementation is concrete and non-stubbed; regression tests are real (lines 64-101 of tests/unit/test_resolve_symbol_tool.py). The ticket comment attests local CI green with Gerrit change 711 (https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/711), but that is not required evidence here.

criteria.criterion: `make lint`, `make typecheck`, and the affected unit tests pass.
